figures.caption: Fig. 1. Overview of Data Recording Process. Sensor signals from the vehicles were transmitted via the CAN bus and captured using a proprietary logging device connected to the network. Following data collection, a team of technicians systematically analyzed the sensor traces and maintenance information to assign ground-truth labels.

Table 1. Segment-Based Anomaly F1-Scores Across the EngineAD Fleet. Performance measured by the F1-score for nine one-class anomaly detection models. Each result represents the performance on a single vehicle, where models were trained on normal segments and tested on a held-out set containing both normal and anomaly segments.
